articles.title: Metal Cock Ring Guide: Fit, Weight, and Care

articles.intent_cluster: Couples accessories — material-specific cock ring buying intent

articles.title: Long-Distance Adult Toys: Privacy Buying Guide

articles.intent_cluster: Buying decision framework — app/remote long-distance adult toy privacy intent
